questions: how many countries are in NATO?
answers: NATO stands for North Atlantic Treaty Organization, a military alliance of 31+ member countries from North America and Europe formed in 1949 for collective defense.
NATO gothon hoyechilo Cold War er somoy Soviet Union er biruddhe collective security ensure korar jonno. Article 5 bole ekjon er upor attack mane shobার upor attack.
NATO is a political and military alliance where member nations agree to mutual defense, meaning an attack on one member is considered an attack on all members.
NATO coordinates military operations, conducts joint exercises, and provides a framework for political consultation on security issues among its member states.
